reviews.review_description: Thought I would give it a try and if I didn’t like I would just get a refund. WRONG!!! The game is not available for a refund whatever that means. Avoid this game and the developer! Scam!!!!

reviews.review_title: JUST BAD!! I wish I read the reviews
reviews.review_description:
This game is just poorly implemented and put together... 

The controls are just horrible, the flight model is obnoxious and wrong...  

The slightest touch to the ground (ie setting the helicopter down) causes it to blow up!!  So much wrong with this game, it is such a disappointment!

Like i commented on their other game, this as well DOES have potential, and IS fixable, they just need to fix the VR interactions and give that flight model some love.

I feel like the dev didnt get either games play tested or got any feedback, but instead is just pumping out games with the same issues and same level of broken on all of them. 

Would request a refund but unfortunately i cant because I bought this devs 3 game bundle. I hope that money goes into "fixing the bad games we have released" funds , would NOT be buying anything by this dev moving forward!
Not great very disappointed..wouldn't a give me a refund either..avoid
